welcome.title: Welcome to MatchaClaw
welcome.description: Your AI assistant is ready to be configured

welcome.title: Welcome to MatchaClaw
welcome.description: MatchaClaw is a graphical interface for OpenClaw, making it easy to use AI assistants across your favorite messaging platforms.

license.label: License Key
license.hint: You must validate a license key before moving to the next step.

messages.cache_grace_valid: Validation passed from cached offline grace period
messages.network_error: Cannot reach license service, please check network and retry
messages.server_rejected: License was rejected by license service
messages.device_mismatch: License does not match this device
messages.unknown: License validation failed, please try again
messages.requiredBeforeSkip: Complete license validation before skipping setup

status.waitingConnectAutoStart: Waiting to connect to gateway (auto-start if needed)...
status.connectTimeoutAfterAutoStart: Gateway connection timed out (not ready after auto-start)

issue.title: Environment issue detected
issue.desc: Please ensure OpenClaw is properly installed. Check the logs for details.

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.title: Installing Essential Components
installing.subtitle: Setting up the tools needed to power your AI assistant
installing.wait: This may take a few moments...

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: MatchaClaw is configured and ready to use. You can now start chatting with your AI assistant.
complete.footer: You can customize skills and connect channels in Settings
